sections.title: History of Hertogen van Brabant
sections.content: The Hertogen van Brabant is the oldest castle in Turnhout. It is really big and it has a beautiful moat around it. It was built in 1183 and first it was a hunting lodge. As time kept progressing it turned out to be a prison, then a weaverschool and so on.

sections.title: This Website
sections.content: We (Emiel, Fjorre, Oscar and Louis) built this website so you can revisit the website later if you want to discover the castle again. We then made a quiz built to test your knowledge about this castle. Good luck!
